video_info.title: UEFA Champions League 2025-26
video_info.shortDescription: Galatasaray host Liverpool at Rams Park in a fiery Round of 16 opener, leaning on their electric home atmosphere and quick combination play to unsettle the visitors. Liverpool, meanwhile, aim to assert their tempo early, aiming to achieve a positive away result to tilt the tie in their favor. Catch all the action from UEFA Champions League 2025-26, LIVE & exclusively on Sony LIV.

Catch all the action from UEFA Champions League 2025-26, LIVE & exclusively on Sony LIV.
